comparison_contract.commercial: Partnership, MSA, order, backlog, shipment and recognized revenue remain separate.
comparison_contract.financial: Preserve currency, period and group or segment boundary; group revenue is not AI revenue.

comparison_contract.power: IT MW, utility MW, generator MW, transformer MVA and battery MW/MWh are different denominators.
